judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After querying only records where Patents_info LIKE '%UNIV CALIFORNIA%' (call_92Gv62Hc06tyNHGMNt0zYCF0), the agent then searched for citing patents within that same filtered subset (execute_python call_5TcLo32xNarR5EVWev2OedAS, using "all_recs = data"), thereby missing other assignees' publications and incorrectly concluding there were no citers.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python (var_call_h1dfrEX7n45YNbqi7HgQtEIC), the agent constructed the target set from publication_numbers cited by UC-assigned patents (ucited) and then looked for publications citing those numbers, rather than identifying UC-assigned publication_numbers themselves and finding assignees who cite them, leading to an "UNKNOWN" assignee and incorrect CPC titles.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After fetching UNIV CALIFORNIA-owned publications (query_db var_call_Fwfwondyax8aJgQAxiu1Z0wz), the agent treated those UC records as the citing side and used their own CPC codes (execute_python var_call_9VCDHApFDJjhzqAjXFNLRGXc) instead of finding other publications that cite UC patents and extracting those assignees and their CPCs, thus reversing the citation direction and yielding "UNIV CALIFORNIA..." as the assignee.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried only publications whose Patents_info contained "UNIV CALIFORNIA" (var_call_tIG3ikT6XSN8iFYcew9K0o1H) and then searched for citations within that subset (var_call_Xzgb74qIkeG0JADN65DiC6Ej), never scanning all assignees nor mapping primary CPC codes to titleFull, so it missed non-UC assignees citing UC patents and returned an empty result.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After extracting many UNIV CALIFORNIA publication numbers from Patents_info (call_qcTaQmDKZigyj5QSd4cEBbja and call_iT2EsoCwvLHvJmJQN91miH1w), the agent searched for citing records using a query that only checked four of those numbers (call_1emL0DesISrCnggINEm2rOuN), found none, and prematurely concluded there were no citations—an incorrect implementation that ignored most targets and thus failed to proceed to assignee/CPC title extraction.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
